statement: Blackwell availability is expected to exert 10-20% downward pressure on H100 secondary pricing.
why: Incoming newer-generation Blackwell supply is expected to reduce demand for and resale value of H100 in the secondary market.

impact.mechanism: Rising Blackwell availability erodes H100 secondary resale prices.

evidence.source: Compute Exchange — NVIDIA H100 GPU Price in 2026 (secondary market)
evidence.excerpt: Blackwell availability is expected to exert 10-20% downward pressure on H100 secondary pricing.

confidence.basis: forward-looking expectation stated in secondary-market blog

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: statement/trend changed (trend flat -> falling); sources: Compute Exchange — NVIDIA H100 GPU Price in 2026 (secondary market)
